rawAssistant: I'm Bram Kettle, Quartermaster of Stonewake. I've got just the thing for travelers on the north road. You're looking well-prepared, but a good kit's never too much. Fresh supplies in stock: road kits with extra charms, potions for a quick heal, Cold Salve to ease sore muscles, and Antidote for any surprises on the road. What can I help you stock up on today?
